TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pakwari, title = Pakwari, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakwari} }

S.FORM: alang Pakwari ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 193 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 148 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 51%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga Quwis awi'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pakwari ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 193 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 148 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 51%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga Quwis awi'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕӢ pakwari ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku ОІjori keЕӢ atu tajaЕӢ ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕӢ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa, tajan **%, amis~Й• *%, s~Й•ajs~Й•ijat *%, ОІunun *%, КҰ~КЁou *%. maki qu ЕӢas~Й•al ОІziran, ru kjokaj. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na pakwari Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj К”zil na pakwari Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj mkjaД§uК” na pakwari Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkrajaК” na pakwari Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj mkjaД§uК” na pakwari Д§jaК” ЙЈa quwis~Й• awiК”. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” КҰ~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” КҰ~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕӢan na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
